<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 350; 50; 85; 250; 600; 1000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Laser Sight; Precise Aiming; Stronger Bullets; Dual Wield; Field Operator
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 3278746120; 3278749117; 3278750530; 3278741672; 3279537687
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Range !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 1.5 || 12 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 1.5 || 14 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 1.5 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 1.5 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.75 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 0.75 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
